caption:
A tiler we work with sent loads of quotes — and heard nothing back.

Quote out, then silence. No time to chase, so every 'maybe' quietly turned into a 'no'. The jobs went to whoever followed up — usually not him. So we set up automatic follow-up plus instant enquiry replies: every quote gets chased, every new enquiry answered in seconds.

The 'maybes' that used to vanish now turn into booked jobs.

Quotes going cold? Free audit — link in bio. 👇

#tiler #tiling #tradesbusiness #ukandireland #leadgen
